---
title: "PSA: Correct link for Assistant Director Apps."
author: "Chris Chartier"
date: 2018-07-10
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: right
categories:
  - Accelerators Update
  - Mailchimp Backup
---

::: callout-note
Edited: 02 June 2026 by Sara Eftekhari
:::

# Sorry!

The last email contained an incorrect link for the Assistant Director application form.
My apologies.

Here is the [updated link](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdrKXwTiPfumnosHZMdP7SA6VJXNf77EtYoRihS-T-3Qxq5DA/viewform).
